name: Team Ed Markey
subject: We need your activism to stop gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team: Ed Markey is standing up to call on Mitch McConnell to allow a vote on commonsense gun safety legislation.

Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have blocked all gun reform legislation while taking millions of dollars in campaign donations from the NRA.

_**[Enough is enough. Sign the petition to call on Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell to allow a vote on commonsense gun safety legislation now.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df73/693b8b0a/43f5be93/72de798d/2294684975/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
> Team,
>
> Yesterday, at the exact moment Democrats called for a vote on the universal gun background checks bill passed by the House, news broke of another mass shooting--this time at a California high school.
>
> And then, Republicans blocked the vote.
>
> We cannot continue to live with the bloodshed and death of mass shootings.
>
> [_**I am calling on Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell to stop blocking gun safety legislation. Join me and call for action now by signing our petition.**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df73/693b8b0a/43f5be93/72de798d/2294684975/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
>
> **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df73/693b8b0a/43f5be93/72de798c/2294684975/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
> Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have blocked all gun reform legislation while taking millions of dollars in campaign donations from the NRA.
>
> The majority of Americans support commonsense solutions to end gun violence. The only thing standing in our way are leaders who are in the pockets of gun manufacturers.
>
> **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df73/693b8b0a/43f5be93/72de798c/2294684975/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
> In Massachusetts, we took matters into our own hands.
>
> We identified the problems of gun violence, put our communities and public safety officers first, and passed gun reform laws.
>
> We now have one of the lowest levels of gun deaths in the country. This is not a coincidence.
>
> We need reforms at the national level, and Mitch McConnell must stop blocking commonsense solutions on behalf of the NRA.
>
> [_**If you agree, sign my petition and call on Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell to allow a vote on commonsense gun safety legislation now.**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df73/693b8b0a/43f5be93/72de798c/2294684975/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
>
> **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df73/693b8b0a/43f5be93/72de798c/2294684975/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
> Thanks for standing with me,
>
> Ed
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?RE=3A_Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: I'm not afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Since Julian reached out to ask for your help, he SURGED in a new poll. Our combined voices are WORKING -- **but Juli an hasn't heard from you yet.** **[_We 're doing everything in our power to capitalize on this moment, but Julian still wants to hear from you. Will you take Julian's critical Priorities survey before midnight and share the issues most important to you? >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d6770/1074450027/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20191115_em_pet_b3_rejc_all")** **\----------- Forwarded Message -----------** From: Julian Castro Date: Thursday, November 14, 2019 Subject: I'm not afraid to say it To: dpwillis67@gmail.com _**This a long email. I 'm asking you to please read the entire thing, and then join me in speaking truth to power.**_ I was the only candidate on the debate stage who called victims of police brutality by name. I was the only candidate on the debate stage who acknowledged gun violence is a white supremacy issue. I was the only candidate on the debate stage with the courage to say our primary system doesn't empower the votes of black women. I was the only candidate on the debate stage who knows what it's like to be from a Latinx immigrant family in the age of Trump. I've been fighting for what others are afraid to tackle for this entire campaign. Yet as a result, the media and the establishment have stifled our bold ideas. [**_I 'm demanding that every Democratic candidate take a stance on each of these issues. If you agree, will you sign my petition before midnight and join me in demanding answers? >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d6770/1074450027/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20191115_em_pet_b3_rejc_all") At every turn, our progressive agenda shaped this race. I won't let this movement or our voices be silenced. | Please sign your name alongside mine before midnight and demand that all candidates directly answer questions about the issues most important to us and our families. [**_Sign your name next to mine now. >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d6770/1074450027/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20191115_em_pet_b3_rejc_all")
---

Thank you,

Julian
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d677f/1074450027/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d677e/1074450027/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d677d/1074450027/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d677c/1074450027/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d677b/1074450027/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82e/3eb3e2fc/575949d6/744d677a/1074450027/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: BFA Finance Team
subject: Checking in on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team - did you see Michael's note from earlier today?

We only have a few hours until our midnight deadline, and we're just short of the **$15,OOO we need to reach our fundraising projection.**

Please, take a moment to read Michael's note and make your first donation to support this campaign.

[We can't do it without you, team.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae25/134673f2/99a2eee/6997d581/4088065091/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B3_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae25/134673f2/99a2eee/6997d580/4088065091/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B3_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

_BEGIN FORWARD:_

* * *

Friends,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in to my campaign. **But first I want to explain why it 's so important that you're a part of this team:**

There are three months until the first ballot is cast, and the race is constantly in flux.

This will be a tough fight, but as the only candidate running who has won two national races in a purple swing state, I'm not afraid of a challenge.

[I owe those victories to my dedicated base of grassroots supporters like you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae25/134673f2/99a2eee/6997d581/4088065091/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B3_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Now we've set a goal of raising **$15,OOO by midnight tonight.** It's a big goal, but hitting it will allow us to run ads, expand our field operations, and keep knocking doors.

[We're only $5,740 short. Friend, will you to make your first donation to close the gap and keep this campaign going strong? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae25/134673f2/99a2eee/6997d581/4088065091/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B3_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---

---
| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae25/134673f2/99a2eee/6997d580/4088065091/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B3_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Cory Booker
subject: hey there, can we talk?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, My team's been updating me throughout the day with where we are on our Ground Game Fund, and I've got to be honest, unless we see a surge of support before midnight, we will fall about $100,000 short of our goal. **[I know what this team can do. So before you head in for the night, I need to ask one last time before our deadline: Can you make a donation to this campaign?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191115_CB_20191115-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Making sure we hit every goal from here on out is critical to the future of this effort. Whether I stand on that debate stage next month is up to what this team can do in moments like this. I know it seems like a difficult number to reach, but this team has beaten the odds in the past -- and I know we can do it again. That's what our campaign is all about -- people coming together to achieve things once thought to be impossible. **[Chip in right now, and let's show the world what we can do together.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191115_CB_20191115-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191115_CB_20191115-fr-CB-beforebed-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

name: Team Tina
subject: It's a lot to juggle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
There's a lot going on in Washington right now. That's why we're reaching out for your help before midnight.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-juggle?refcode=em191115-juggle&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

Between legislation piling up on Mitch McConnell's desk and the dangerous antics of the Trump administration -- to say there's a lot happening in Washington right now would be the understatement of the century.

It's a lot to juggle, and with Tina staying focused on doing her job in the Senate on top of campaigning, she hasn't had a lot of time to raise money. So, we've fallen slightly behind on fundraising in the past week.

Republicans and their special interest allies will be looking for any sort of weakness to capitalize on, and we can't give them anything to pounce on. That's why we're asking:

**Can you rush an urgent contribution of $10 (or more!) before tonight's midnight fundraising deadline to help Tina and our team get back on track? If we can catch up in the next few hours, we'll be on pace to win re-election. You can donate right here:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-juggle?refcode=em191115-juggle&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Before I turn in for the night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
I'm about to turn in for the night, but I wanted to check in with you first. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144e/691c9bd/6f8196ff/11a7e315/2256245859/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| | We're coming up short on our $100,000 fundraising goal for tomorrow night's deadline. **Can you chip in now to make sure we 're keeping pace with Cory Gardner's fundraising haul last week?**

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191115_JH_20191115-fr-JH-beforebed-2mo_2mo_callout&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---

Team,

I'm about to turn in for the night, but I wanted to check in with you first.

**Here 's the scoop: We've set a goal of raising $100,000 by tomorrow night to stay on track with the other side's fundraising--and my team tells me we're just about $41,380 from that goal. So I have to ask: [_Can you chip in before the night is over?_](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191115_JH_20191115-fr-JH-beforebed-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")**

Mitch McConnell's fundraising machine is hard at work trying to hold on to this seat because Cory Gardner is such a reliable rubber stamp for Trump and the Republican Senate agenda. Donald Trump himself pitched in to raise over $100,000 online for Gardner just a couple of weeks ago.

That's why we set this grassroots goal. It might seem steep, **but if each one of us steps up to do our part, we can close the fundraising gap.[_Can you chip in before you go to bed?_](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191115_JH_20191115-fr-JH-beforebed-2mo_2mo_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thank you,

John

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191115_JH_20191115-fr-JH-beforebed-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144e/691c9bd/6f8196ff/11a7e30e/2256245859/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144e/691c9bd/6f8196ff/11a7e30f/2256245859/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144e/691c9bd/6f8196ff/11a7e30c/2256245859/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144e/691c9bd/6f8196ff/11a7e30d/2256245859/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144e/691c9bd/6f8196ff/11a7e30a/2256245859/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144e/691c9bd/6f8196ff/11a7e30b/2256245859/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144e/691c9bd/6f8196ff/11a7e30e/2256245859/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: wasting time on a partisan impeachment sham
body:
Instead of working for the American people, House Democrats are wasting time on a partisan impeachment sham to undo President Trump's 2016 victory.

Peter,

Instead of working for the American people, House Democrats are wasting time on a partisan impeachment sham to undo President Trump's 2016 victory.

I’m ready to go to the Senate and stand with President Trump. He needs more conservative fighters willing to speak out against this impeachment circus. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll make a generous donation to our campaign right now. [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/stop-impeachment?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sham]

Let’s be clear. The Democrats have wanted to impeach President Trump since he took office. They can’t accept that the American people elected this president and they're terrified he'll win again. AOC even admitted it:

"We're talking about the potential compromise of the 2020 elections, and so this is not just about something that has occurred, this is about preventing a potentially disastrous outcome from occurring next year." - Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez on impeachment

We need to send a strong message: The voters should decide elections, not Washington liberals.

Help me do it by donating right now. [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/stop-impeachment?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sham]

Thank you.

Bill Hagerty

Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN)

DONATE NOW [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/stop-impeachment?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sham] Team Hagerty

Suite 110

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: This is a total SCHIFF SHOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
He’s a national disgrace. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=ec1b9d6fc91183a9531563d2836ea4f6af8b77a94c54837b18867d9b6007745caf7474a23d635adfb982c4086306f3a84df377166b0ecfda)
---
|

Friend,

Little Adam Schiff, the leader of the impeachment witch hunt, is a national disgrace.

He wasted MILLIONS of your taxpayer dollars on a two and a half year Witch Hunt that ended with a costly total exoneration of President Trump.

He lied to the American people saying he had proof of collusion, but the FACTS proved that he is nothing but a corrupt liar.

Despite his long history of corruption and lies, Democrats and the FAKE NEWS are still following him down the path of yet ANOTHER bogus impeachment witch hunt that is built on LIES.

Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff and Ted Lieu - these are the Democrats responsible for the bogus impeachment hearings which just began on Capitol Hill this week.

**Veterans for Wes Reception**

name: MarkWarnerVA.com
subject: troubling news from Nate Silver
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We have some troubling news from Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a7/53d9897e/53db16c9/1c89e044/492614536/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?refcode=20191116nd__336__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Derek, I know we're still celebrating a great week for Virginia Democrats, but we have some _troubling news_ from Nate Silver of FiveThirtyEight.

FiveThirtyEight ran an article analyzing 2020 Senate races and they rated Virginia's partisan lean as only _**D+0.1!**_

**Remember, Mark only won his last race in 2014 by _less than 1%,_ so there's no doubt about it: this WILL be a tough race.

Even though we had a good week, we can't take anything for granted. We have to start preparing now if we're going to carry this momentum into 2020. Can you chip in -- any amount -- today to help send Mark back to the Senate?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a7/53d9897e/53db16c9/1c89e043/492614536/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191116nd__336__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a7/53d9897e/53db16c9/1c89e042/492614536/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191116nd__336__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a7/53d9897e/53db16c9/1c89e041/492614536/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191116nd__336__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a7/53d9897e/53db16c9/1c89e040/492614536/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191116nd__336__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a7/53d9897e/53db16c9/1c89e04f/492614536/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?express_lane=true&refcode=20191116nd__336__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a7/53d9897e/53db16c9/1c89e04e/492614536/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?refcode=20191116nd__336__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
Since Virginia will be a battleground state in next year's presidential election, the Trump campaign has already begun pouring money into our Commonwealth in an effort to turn it red -- **_and defeat Mark._**

The Trump campaign even located its headquarters in Northern Virginia! That's how much they're investing in simultaneously flipping Virginia and Mark's seat.

Six years ago, when Mark last ran for re-election, polls consistently had him leading Ed Gillespie by double digits. Political experts even rated his race as a **_Likely D_** win.

But when the dust settled, Mark won by **_0.8%, or 17,727 votes._** Virginia is always competitive and 2020 won't be an exception.

**We need to raise enough money before 2019 ends so we can head into 2020 fired up and ready to expand our team, run ads, and knock doors.[How much we're able to raise depends on you. Can you pitch in today?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7a7/53d9897e/53db16c9/1c89e04d/492614536/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMzNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fivethirtyeight?refcode=20191116nd__336__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

name: Michael (personal)
subject: I have to be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends -

When I spoke to my family about running for president, my daughter Caroline told me:

_" Dad, if you run and tell the truth and lose, no one can fault you."_

I'm going to tell you the truth - [last night, we missed our deadline by about $2,000.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9d6/134673f2/99bd262/6997d5ac/4289804763/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

I wouldn't be emailing you if this wasn't absolutely critical

name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: we need to get moving NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Senator Cornyn has taken millions from corporate PACs, but MJ is building a grassroots campaign as big as Texas.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a811/3047939209/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a810/3047939209/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?refcode=email_20191116.1nd__507__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
We'll be blunt, Peter:

We're over halfway through the month and **we're not on track to meet our $58,852 November goal.** There's still enough time left to get back on course, but folks will be tuning out for the holidays soon so we need to get moving _now_ to reach our goal by the end of the month!

**Will you rush a donation to help us get back on track and DEFEAT Senator Cornyn? We still have to raise over $48,000!**
[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a810/3047939209/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?refcode=email_20191116.1nd__507__&amount=10&recurring=true")
Since MJ launched her campaign, over 21,000 donors have pitched in to help us grow our grassroots organization. That's allowed MJ to travel over 8,000 miles and speak with thousands of Texans from El Paso to Houston and in between.

Senator Cornyn has taken millions from corporate PACs but MJ is building a grassroots campaign as big as Texas: **nine out of 10 donations to MJ for Texas are under $100.**

It's the right thing to do -- but it means we need you with us! **So Peter, will you please make your first donation* and help us get back on track toward our November goal?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a817/3047939209/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191116.1nd__507__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a816/3047939209/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191116.1nd__507__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a815/3047939209/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191116.1nd__507__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a814/3047939209/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191116.1nd__507__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a80b/3047939209/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?refcode=email_20191116.1nd__507__")**
Thanks,
Team MJ

*If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! Our records are based on our online database which may take some time to update.

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e7/7f51f7bc/4be9f447/4ef0a810/3047939209/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-novposteom?refcode=email_20191116.1nd__507__&amount=10&recurring=true")

name: Warren HQ
subject: Right now, we're coming up a little short of where we need to be to hit our November fundraising goal, and we're asking if you're able to take the next step and make your first donation to this campaign today to get our numbers back on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Our supporters make it possible for Elizabeth to host town halls across the country and talk about our plans that will level the playing field for working people. At each event, Elizabeth gets... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528922/45c30650/11acec97e/66f4d2b7/3135197354/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We're grateful for everything you do -- signing up for campaign updates, filling out surveys, sharing plans, and talking with your neighbors about why you're in this fight. Thank you.

Right now, we're coming up a little short of where we need to be to hit our November fundraising goal, and we're asking if you're able to take the next step and make your first donation to this campaign today to get our numbers back on track.

name: Cory Booker
subject: hey, I need to share some news with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| First, the bad news, friend: We fell $84,723 short of our Ground Game Fund goal last night. As I write this, we're going back to the drawing board on strategy. **But there 's some good news, too:** I just got word that we don't have to make any decisions about changes to our strategy until I step on the debate stage Wednesday night. So that gives us an extension to reach this goal and fully put our Ground Game Fund into action. **[I know a little something about come-from-behind victories -- if you want to see it happen for us, will you rush a donation right now?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191116_CB_20191116-fr-CB-morning-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** The truth is if we fail to qualify for the December debate, our best avenue to reach the millions of undecided voters in this race will be cut off, and we'll be at a real disadvantage next month. I won't sugar coat anything. We're facing an uphill fight to earn a spot in that debate. Every day, we're closing in on the donor threshold, and I believe we will get there. In doing so, we'll tell an incredible, humbling story about how many Americans believe in this grassroots campaign. But we still need a handful of polls to show _just a slight uptick_ in momentum. It's going to come down to the wire. We have a plan to pull it off, but it simply won't happen without this Ground Game Fund. I believe so strongly in this team -- every step of the way, you've earned my faith. **I 'm reaching out today to ask you one more time to put your faith in me and what we're building together. [Before I step on the debate stage, if you can, please chip in to help reach our goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191116_CB_20191116-fr-CB-morning-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Your support is something I won't ever forget -- thank you. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191116_CB_20191116-fr-CB-morning-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d69/5fca0d19/79cfdc59/291c7152/3554339681/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d69/5fca0d19/79cfdc59/291c7151/3554339681/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d69/5fca0d19/79cfdc59/291c7150/3554339681/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d69/5fca0d19/79cfdc59/291c715f/3554339681/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d69/5fca0d19/79cfdc59/291c715e/3554339681/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d69/5fca0d19/79cfdc59/291c7152/3554339681/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Mike Turner
subject: Let's put a stop to this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Despite having no credible witnesses or first hand evidence, Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff are continuing to waste taxpayer money with their sham of an investigation.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
Despite having no credible witnesses or first hand evidence, Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff are continuing to waste taxpayer money with their sham of an investigation.
This week,[_**two of the witnesses handpicked by Schiff in the impeachment inquiry admitted that they have never met, nor have they ever been in contact with President Trump**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0). The only evidence these un-credible witnesses had was backroom, second hand rumors.
[_**The entire process that Schiff and Pelosi have orchestrated has been unfair and unethical from the beginning**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0). They have already got their verdict before the impeachment proceedings began. I will not sit back and allow them to make a mockery of America's constitutional foundation.
[_**We can 't allow them to continue this partisan impeachment agenda!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Let's put a stop to this, Peter.
[_**If you want this political investigation to end, please rush in a donation NOW to put a stop to this partisan impeachment process!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[Rush in $75 to stop partisan impeachment!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Rush in $50 to stop partisan impeachment!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Rush in $45 to stop partisan impeachment!](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Rush in any amount to stop partisan impeachment! ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
Together, we can end this politically misguided impeachment process.
Thank you,

Mike Turner
**[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDExMjU0ODYS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM4MzMyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you, Mike Turner PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER 120 W. Second St. #1510 Dayton, OH 45402 If you would prefer not to receive future emails,

name: Flip North Carolina's 2nd District
subject: We need a productive Congress.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Monika has the experience to get things done.

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d979/7dfbb003/42ac4886/5527b74d/1707658382/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191116_em_experience&source=rtw_20191116_em_experience")
---
Friend,

Monika has over 20 years' experience advocating to Congress for students and survivors--and while she's not a political insider, she knows how to _talk_ to one.

Between her day job as Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, her work for three terms on the board for one of the largest school districts in the country, and her experience as a sexual assault policy advocate, Monika knows how to get things done.

Just last week, as a direct result of her work, North Carolina _finally_ passed a law allowing women to revoke consent after a sex act has begun.

**Change often starts with one person. In this case, it starts with this campaign and its supporters.[Donate today to help us send Monika to Congress, where she can use her experience to get things done for this district.](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d979/7dfbb003/42ac4886/5527b742/1707658382/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+Donate+today+to+help+us+send+Monika+to+C&utm_campaign=rtw_20191116_em_experience&source=rtw_20191116_em_experience")**

This district has never been represented by a Black woman, and it's certainly never been represented by an advocate like Monika.

**It's time to change that.**

We're building a campaign to flip North Carolina's 2nd District blue and put integrity back in office. This kind of campaign thrives off of grassroots support alone, so we're asking you to step up today.

**[Will you chip in $25, or whatever you can, to help us put Monika in Congress? This month, we're staffing up, and we really need your support to do that.](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d979/7dfbb003/42ac4886/5527b743/1707658382/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&refcode2=CTA1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+chip+in+25+or+whatever+you+can+&utm_campaign=rtw_20191116_em_experience&source=rtw_20191116_em_experience")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d979/7dfbb003/42ac4886/5527b740/1707658382/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191116_em_experience&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=4+-+5+raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191116_em_experience&source=rtw_20191116_em_experience")

The team here, and Monika, are all so grateful for the support you've shown us.

Team Monika

| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. name: Kevin & Margaret
subject: FWD: BREAKING -- key 2020 endorsement! 📣📣
body:
We’ve got exciting news! Hey Friend,Just wanted to make sure you saw our big news!! Our campaign is only the 4th race the League of Conservation Voters has chosen to support this year. Margaret is one of Florida's strongest environmental champions and with your support we can take her to Washington, D.C.!
Can you stand with LCV and support our campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14]
Thank you!
Kevin Lata, Campaign Manager
---------Forwarded message---------
From: Margaret Good < campaign@margaretgood.com [campaign@margaretgood.com] >
Date: Thu, Nov 14, 2019 at 1:08 PM
Subject: (HTML VERSION): BREAKING -- key 2020 endorsement!📣 [https://mail.google.com/mail/e/1f4e3]📣 [https://mail.google.com/mail/e/1f4e3]
To: < kevin@margaretgood.com >
https://margaretgood.com [https://margaretgood.com]
Friend -- we’ve got exciting news! We were just endorsed by The League of Conservation Voters -- the leading grassroots advocacy group committed to advancing policies that protect our environment.
It’s no secret the climate change deniers have corrupted Washington and prevented our country from taking critical steps to protect our environment. But that’s why now more than ever, we need leaders in Congress willing to prioritize clean air and water.
Can you join LCV in supporting our campaign by making a donation of $ 10 or more? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14]
secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14 [secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14]
After the 2018 Red Tide crisis, we saw the effects of decades of inaction and an inexcusable lack of environmental protection. Florida’s economy and communities depend on maintaining healthy coastlines and waters. Water is our most precious natural resource. I will fight to protect our water every day as your Congresswoman. But to do so, I need your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14]
We know special interests groups will be spending millions trying to keep people like Vern Buchanan in Congress who support dangerous environmental policies and put money over people. LCV is active in bringing powerful voices that support our environment to Washington to introduce policies that support clean air, water, and our economy.
Join LCV and our campaign today in the fight for our environment and donate $ 10 or more right now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/goodq42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.14]
Thank you for your support in the fight for our future,
Margaret

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump is less popular than Richard Nixon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Trump likes to tout fake numbers on his Twitter, spouting about how good the economy is and how high his popularity ratings are \-- but the truth is that his approval rating is underwater at barely above 41%, with almost 55% of Americans DISAPPROVING of him. That's worse than Richard Nixon's approval ratings at the same time in his presidency. It's obvious that he won't listen to facts and will continue lying to the American people. While it seems far off, Election Day 2020 is less than one year away, and we need to know exactly where the electorate stands on Trump so we can tailor our strategy to get him out of office: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3e/6e9863e8/16744e38/1db093c4/986490049/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/T7fSGdqj") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3e/6e9863e8/16744e38/1db093c4/986490049/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/T7fSGdqj") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3e/6e9863e8/16744e38/1db093cb/986490049/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191116a.ND-b&refcode2=BVt262xHS8FQLa1GOSQm")

body:
| | |

| |

| | [**_In a moment, I 'm going to ask for $5._**](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191116_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") But first, let me explain why.

I believe deep down Democrats will lose this election if we're too afraid to take a stand.

That's why I was the first candidate to call victims of police brutality by name at the debates...

The first candidate to call for decriminalizing our border to stop family separations...

One of the first candidates to acknowledge gun violence is a white supremacy issue...

The only candidate with the courage to say our primary system doesn't empower the votes of black women....

**I 've been fighting for what others are afraid to tackle for this entire campaign. I've fearlessly had your back. And now I need you to have mine.**

I'm counting on you to keep me in this race and get my message out to voters. Can I count in your $5?
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82f/3eb3e2fc/575f9225/744d676f/1136557266/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191116_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82f/3eb3e2fc/575f9225/744d6769/1136557266/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82f/3eb3e2fc/575f9225/744d6768/1136557266/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc82f/3eb3e2fc/575f9225/744d6757/1136557266/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

That's why I was the first candidate to call victims of police brutality by name at the debates... The first candidate to call for decriminalizing our border to stop family separations... One of the first candidates to acknowledge gun violence is a white supremacy issue... The only candidate with the courage to say our primary system doesn't empower the votes of black women.... I 've been fighting for what others are afraid to tackle for this entire campaign. I've fearlessly had your back. And now I need you to have mine. I'm counting on you to keep me in this race and get my message out to voters. Can I count in your $5? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Holcomb Finance Crew
subject: In less than 12 months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
In less than 12 months, Hoosiers will head to the polls to cast their ballots and chart a path forward for our state. We’ll be honest. If we want... | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=051e84e32a764236b63614a55dded338&_e=zUszkWWYJ_p9uI33LJrqw86PJv6F3SKkwbmR1V2yPNkKI88ZFx-kw5QLXZ7ujgk7wJ8iY_MJBSJ1O_vfwQVNr_hb8YHeEsZH61SD37aJwdTAokUnJ3Tazdp3WqoXnoUgtWnGew7O4vkDghooLTMSRFDZtt_a-VCjXTtZpiklZRIuSpwlC4X6rtEzaL94KkJ_k_UpnVOiLYttJ9TLzLqIoMXEe0MLrZCa0vZgcqtKPqImEa7hjK19S-iZtLpkBP1BIvXqSL3ANvrsr7gp16ow4uUGdYetrkMSw7MDDZSUO0GsWEmRSrIh4MhBMkHWP7LYVVE_t3IlIl7VgPF6wZkva-on_QfVJoyuBM5lsuvZ3TcvyOHfN6QrKIjr612h4zsqQUu5rGo--Jii2nQn1FgntQ%3D%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

In less than 12 months, Hoosiers will head to the polls to cast their ballots and chart a path forward for our state.

_We’ll be honest._

_If we want to keep Putting People First and building a brighter future for ALL Hoosiers, we’ll need you on the team from today until Election Day 2020, and beyond._
[ **Pledge a contribution** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=051e84e32a764236b63614a55dded338&_e=zUszkWWYJ_p9uI33LJrqw86PJv6F3SKkwbmR1V2yPNkKI88ZFx-kw5QLXZ7ujgk7wJ8iY_MJBSJ1O_vfwQVNr_hb8YHeEsZH61SD37aJwdTAokUnJ3Tazdp3WqoXnoUgtWnGew7O4vkDghooLTMSRFDZtt_a-VCjXTtZpiklZRIuSpwlC4X6rtEzaL94KkJ_xmAeVBODTgNDfHnKe8sPgCXBfrmRJNcWpv3KCEo6ZO7Oj_YdZJbA3wMe4XNQl0c-YQFf-oEsKb5zH08qyCdq4F6hIHHM4mXeM6NT0wCBZTeJ4cMKbSixrlqSuGHBCN-5hUiz2LJzqbdT-FbkxOlM6D78qra4ldJyir6Gf9H-euGYzkbv2J7etcD5hymQzxuBpUqWx7m04gUa59eT9SKGKQ%3D%3D)
We need your help over the next few months -- volunteering to share news of Governor Holcomb’s accomplishments with your neighbors, sharing our posts on social media, and chipping in a few dollars so we have the resources we need to go the distance.

We realize that Hoosiers work hard for their money and can’t always give each time we ask.

That’s why we created our 2020 pledge. Instead of giving now, you can pick a time and date that’s best for you and pledge a contribution to the Governor’s 2020 campaign. **[Will you pledge a donation today?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=051e84e32a764236b63614a55dded338&_e=zUszkWWYJ_p9uI33LJrqw86PJv6F3SKkwbmR1V2yPNkKI88ZFx-kw5QLXZ7ujgk7wJ8iY_MJBSJ1O_vfwQVNr_hb8YHeEsZH61SD37aJwdTAokUnJ3Tazdp3WqoXnoUgtWnGew7O4vkDghooLTMSRFDZtt_a-VCjXTtZpiklZRIuSpwlC4X6rtEzaL94KkJ_1TkB-jDM_8GmTdsA7z3GYiabXNusOauk7eMzMr2OpilM-a68ToiRHB6Xwn6qAyPiu-o2T7Yu39Xcm3QvPzyA0wZ7N7yyzmM0FPQyRJIxxFU-EdudAlC19S_a59-EfkEDtMjFUwOxxEISAp0XU8YtqGDBW1_ZFhfb46-a-ksWVpO2r4cE_1izmWXMidme8hEsQ2UFJMupagEwNREE6VDVSQ%3D%3D)**
[ **Pledge a contribution** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=051e84e32a764236b63614a55dded338&_e=zUszkWWYJ_p9uI33LJrqw86PJv6F3SKkwbmR1V2yPNkKI88ZFx-kw5QLXZ7ujgk7wJ8iY_MJBSJ1O_vfwQVNr_hb8YHeEsZH61SD37aJwdTAokUnJ3Tazdp3WqoXnoUgtWnGew7O4vkDghooLTMSRFDZtt_a-VCjXTtZpiklZRIuSpwlC4X6rtEzaL94KkJ_cFxd5G85JkiFxFNGf40ZcKyIxcNx7CvgBTJPcsVTww2s8h2lWc2BtFKgSbUPZRzuIfYDdVOTdSsiu-7NKsJXKqMX0iCwgZKu_IScGugBJVZO_xOr7DZhKxcIt_7irlDo7RXVqVpHovHLWBxSOTNy5KDFiLSsD54xu-nSL5r7ZOMXrl0Peh27mJRoF_RXc-9sjIFFdAsaE991F7CcjG1LIA%3D%3D)
Thank you for your support — every pledge helps get us closer to another four years of Putting People First.

Sincerely,

Holcomb Crew

name: Robin Hickenlooper
subject: No corporate PAC dollars - just this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Cory Gardner has an advantage in this race, but we can help John get ahead. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144d/691c9bd/6f833894/11a7e091/2608908308/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| | We set a $100,000 fundraising goal to keep pace with Cory Gardner's latest fundraising haul--but we're coming up short. **Can you rush a donation in right now?**

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191116_RH_20191116-fr-RH-gardadvantage-2mo_2mo_callout&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---

Friend,

In moments like this, a team effort is what gets the job done.

The facts are simple. Not only does Cory Gardner have an incumbency advantage, but he's also got big names in the Republican Party rushing to his defense. That's on top of deep-pocketed corporate special interests who have made it clear they're ready to spend big in Colorado. And of course, he's also got Donald Trump in his corner--Trump recently raised over $100,000 online for Gardner's campaign.

**That 's why we've set a goal of hitting $100,000 by tonight--and we have just $32,109 to go. Now is a time we're counting on everyone to help out. _[Can you chip in with your first donation today?](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191116_RH_20191116-fr-RH-gardadvantage-2mo_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")_**

Cory Gardner will raise big money from his allies in this race, and it's clear what those allies want in return: another six years of someone going along with whatever they want.

From the start of this campaign, John made it clear he's accepting no corporate PAC dollars--which means your grassroots contributions matter even more in the fight to elect a voice that puts Colorado first.

With gratitude,
Robin

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191116_RH_20191116-fr-RH-gardadvantage-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144d/691c9bd/6f833894/11a7e08a/2608908308/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144d/691c9bd/6f833894/11a7e08b/2608908308/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144d/691c9bd/6f833894/11a7e088/2608908308/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144d/691c9bd/6f833894/11a7e089/2608908308/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144d/691c9bd/6f833894/11a7e086/2608908308/VEsHBQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144d/691c9bd/6f833894/11a7e087/2608908308/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377144d/691c9bd/6f833894/11a7e08a/2608908308/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

body:

| | Voter Protection Project is proud to endorse Mike Espy for U.S. Senate. Espy challenged Cindy Hyde-Smith in 2018 and lost by just THREE TENTHS of a point -- meaning that the upcoming election is anyone's to win. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Kendra Horn wants amnesty
body:
If we don't give President Trump a conservative House we will never secure the border. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9a1da1681f9a/calling-all-patriots-12045041?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=3f6393421f&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8845b5b240&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6011145d44&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, A country without strong borders and a lawful immigration system cannot thrive.

Kendra Horn ran as a so-called moderate, but since she's entered office she's been attempting to subvert our lawful immigration system over and over.

She's rejected President Trump's generous offers for a deal on immigration that would give both parties some of their priorities and instead will only support extreme amnesty proposals.

That is unacceptable.

We have all seen the tragic images of the dangerous crossings and the abandoned, abused and exploited children.

[**The answer is clear. We must end the scourge of illegal immigration.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c91b3ef1bb&e=795c6d9796)

When elected to Congress, I promise to help President Trump build the wall, give US Border Patrol and ICE the resources they need to do their jobs, ban Sanctuary Cities, and close loopholes in current law that incentivize the coyotes who traffic women and children across our southern border.

[**If you support a secure border for our country and recognize we need a conservative House in order to get things done, please consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 to help us flip this district.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=882b903169&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=4ca4f6c991&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020" and the Washington Post has rated this the number two race in the country. National Journal has gone one step further and says this is the nation's number one battleground district, and Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ce5d605854&e=795c6d9796)

[**Please contribute $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 to help us take back the House for conservatives and give the president the support he needs in Congress to secure the border.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=45d1ec0ae9&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=88d075ecb2&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=68e5b4ce78&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2019 Janet for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147
[Add us to your address book](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14&e=795c6d9796) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14&e=795c6d9796&c=462f4afd80).

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Demand Congress impeach Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Every day that Trump remains in office is a day putting lives at risk. It's another day for him to issue executive orders on immigration. It's another day for him to insult and abandon another ally. It's another day for him to undermine the Constitution. [**We can 't tolerate this continuing -- we have to stand up and say that enough is enough. If you agree, please add your name to ours and call on Congress to impeach Donald Trump. It's time this nightmare of a presidency ended.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3f/6e9863e8/1671ff1b/1db093cc/2954970856/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/impeach/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing up with us. name: Jeff =?utf-8?b?TGFyaXZlZeKAmXM=?= iPhone
subject: Zoe wanted me to stress this for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Friends, Zoe wanted me to make sure you understood the importance of what’s happening here - if we hadn’t all stepped up to help fund the victories of our California members, impeachment wouldn’t be happening. And if we don’t hold these seats, Trump may NEVER be held accountable. If we have learned anything over the last three years, it's that Republicans in Congress will give Trump a free pass time and time again to do pretty much anything -- with no recourse whatsoever.

Zoe is hoping you can help us hit $5k by the end of today - can you use the link below and chip in? We still have a little over $1,000 to go.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-ms-impeachment?refcode=MS_EM_FR_ACT_191115_2_3&amount=25&recurring=auto [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-ms-impeachment?refcode=MS_EM_FR_ACT_191115_2_3&amount=25&recurring=auto]

Thanks,

Jeff

Sent from my iPhone

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto]

name: Gary Peters
subject: If we win in Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
we'll be done with Mitch McConnell.
| | |
---
Friends,

Our race here in Michigan will decide Senate control, but last quarter, my right-wing opponent broke fundraising records: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell helped him funnel millions into Michigan to defeat me.
I know we're not going to let Mitch McConnell buy Michigan's Senate seat and expand his chokehold on our democracy. We have what it takes to fight back - and with your help, friends, that's exactly what we're going to do.
From where I stand, the importance of taking back the Senate has never been more clear. I hope you'll allow me a moment to explain why.
**If we win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats, we'll be done with Mitch McConnell.**

We'll also protect the future of the Supreme Court: That means protecting everything from reproductive freedoms and affordable health care to voting rights and climate change. And that means no more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh.
**I know what Democrats can do if we win.** But our path to victory won't be easy - the polls show me statistically tied with my right-wing opponent.

The good news is that Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports that the Senate is up for grabs, but we must first win here in Michigan. And just recently, Cook Political Report, an independent election analysis database, increased my likelihood of losing.
**With such razor-thin margins and Senate control on the line, every dollar matters when it comes to winning this race. That's why we set a goal to raise another $10,000 by midnight. And with time running out, we're only 89% of the way to goal.**
Friends - will you pitch in whatever you can afford so we can win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court? Even just $3 will go a long way - you can use this link here: [secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa43/5721a3ed/7116272d/efa8baf/3502613393/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxMzctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk137-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

Thank you,

Gary

Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa43/5721a3ed/7116272d/efa8bad/3502613393/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa43/5721a3ed/7116272d/efa8bac/3502613393/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: This impeachment drama is hurting America
body:
We have to replace the impeachment-first Democrats | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=89c6834be4&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=eabd42c024&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter, This impeachment drama is proof that the Democrats are not equipped to deliver the solutions the American people need.

In fact, these proceedings are a tool for them to distract from the fact that they don't know how to legislate.

Take USMCA for example, a common-sense update to our nation's trade laws that would be a huge help to Iowa farmers. The Democrats have been obstructing relentlessly because they're terrified to give the president anything they consider a win.

That's not America-First, it's self-interest first, and it's disgusting.

It goes to show how important it is that when President Trump wins re-election in 2020 that he have a Congress that has his back.

[**That means flipping the House red again. More specifically it means flipping Democrat-held districts like IA-02 red again.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=723dd089ef&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=5f3501b831&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

[**Will you consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or anything you can to help us flip this district and have President Trump's back in 2020?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=c19ad11d43&e=90fad69796)

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

We can't bring back the American middle class with this group of radical obstructionists holding Congress hostage. We've got to take back the House -- and the only way to do that is to win Democrat-held seats.

[**Please consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or anything you can today so that we can flip IA-02 and pass the America-First agenda Iowans voted for in 2016. **](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=06cf3d5da5&e=90fad69796)

For Iowa,

Bobby Schilling

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Will you officially endorse my campaign for president?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal) **I’m personally asking you to endorse my campaign for president today.

[Add your name to show your support. ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191116PM-all&t=6&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal)** | [Add your name](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191116PM-all&t=9&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal)
---
Yang Gang --

I am currently campaigning around the country -- New Hampshire this week, a big rally in Nevada this weekend and the DNC debate in Atlanta next week.

These last few weeks have been an exciting for us. We aired our first three TV ads in Iowa and New Hampshire, called winners of the Freedom Dividend, and continued to shock the establishment.

I am proud to be running a campaign that focuses on putting Humanity First. And while the media and establishment want to write us off as a long shot campaign, they can’t write off our passion for what we’re fighting for.

You are why this campaign has made it this far -- and frankly, we are only growing. [**If you stand with our Humanity First values and support my campaign, add your name here:**](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191116PM-all&t=8&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal)
[Endorse My Campaign](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191116PM-all&t=7&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal)
---
I am not a politician. I never dreamed of running for president, but I saw the state of our country and I knew I had to do everything in my power to leave a better country for my children.

But I need you to step up with me and support my campaign. Together, we can be the change our country needs and build an economy that focuses on putting our people first.

I am thankful to the ever-growing Yang Gang -- a bold group of supporters that is willing to stand with fellow Americans and put people over politics as usual. There is nothing the Yang Gang can’t accomplish -- and it is how we are going to win in 2020.

[**If you stand with me, add your name to show your support for this campaign. We can take this all the way to the White House.**](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191116PM-all&t=10&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal)

Thank you for your support. Let’s keep building this wave.

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16475?t=2&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=3175%2E377263%2Ee91mal) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
