name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
This is our chance to root out corruption in Washington, right at the source. It's our chance to level the playing field for working families and put political and economic power into the hands of... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852894a/45c30650/11aaf7782/66f4c347/1648000162/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
The rich and the powerful have hijacked our democracy. They've created a system that works for them -- and only them. And to maintain the status quo, they make you think that fighting back isn't worth your time because you'll never win.

They want you to feel tired and overwhelmed.

They want you to think that if you could just pick up a few more hours at work, just cut back on the groceries a bit this week, just skip the doctor's appointment to save money, that you'll finally get ahead. That everything will be fine.

Because they know the truth. If we line up, shoulder-to-shoulder in this fight, if we organize, and if we lift our voices and demand big, structural change, _we can win_.

This is our chance to root out corruption in Washington, right at the source. It's our chance to level the playing field for working families and put political and economic power into the hands of working people.

We're done with a system that only works for a thinner and thinner slice at the top. We're done nibbling around the edges, being satisfied by the absolutely bare minimum.

This grassroots movement is about the people -- and we're ready to fight.

**[We need all hands on deck to hit our November fundraising goal-- it's the best way to ensure our movement can keep growing. Will you make your first contribution to our campaign right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852894a/45c30650/11aaf7782/66f4c34b/1648000162/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDc0Rl9FR1JfR1JNX0NfMjAxOTExMTZfVjFTMV9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML74F_EGR_GRM_C_20191116_V1S1_P_T1")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

subject: Oh no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress](https://go
body:
|
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Do you stand with teachers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, For the past several years, teachers' unions across the country have been going on strike to protest stagnated pay, budget cuts, and ballooning class sizes. They are fed up with state legislatures that don't value the critical work they do and treat education budgets as frivolous spending and school kids as political pawns for negotiating. The Trump administration has been noticeably silent on these strikes \-- probably because Trump campaigned on helping workers but has instead stood by while plants close, company profits soar, and workers' rights are being torn to shreds by judges he nominated. Trump even went out of the way to campaign for Matt Bevin, who disparaged the Kentucky teachers when they were on strike and then lost the Kentucky governorship to Democrat Andy Beshear. We want to know what engaged Democratic voters think about this so we can set up our strategy to help workers in the 2020 elections: **Do you stand with teachers or Trump?** [Teachers](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc24/6e9863e8/16730cf9/1db093d1/1959480489/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/d7sePCYN") [Trump](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc24/6e9863e8/16730cf9/1db093d1/1959480489/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/d7sePCYN") When Democrats Turn Out stands with the teachers and all other workers on the picket line \-- because we know that when Democrats organize, we win. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc24/6e9863e8/16730cf9/1db093d6/1959480489/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191116c.ND&refcode2=gFScD4pXOKcommtX5Jtv")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc24/6e9863e8/16730cf9/1db093db/1959480489/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

subject: I'm not afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:

| | I'm not afraid to say it:

The first two states in the presidential nominating process do not reflect the diversity of our party or the country.

Hear me loud and clear:

**Democrats will lose this election if we take for granted the votes of people who have powered us to victory in the past.**

It's why I've focused my campaign on giving a voice to the voiceless.

And saying what others are too afraid to say.

Will you take a stand with me and rush $5? _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc830/3eb3e2fc/5766dda1/744d6755/3921003923/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20191116_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**

---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc830/3eb3e2fc/5766dda1/744d675e/3921003923/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc830/3eb3e2fc/5766dda1/744d675d/3921003923/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc830/3eb3e2fc/5766dda1/744d675c/3921003923/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: MJ Senior Staff
subject: Sen. Cornyn caught taking illegal contributions!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
You'll want to read this.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909e1/7f51f7bc/4bebe639/4ef0a85a/4226654656/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **First,** Sen. Cornyn spent his career in Washington working for special interests and turning his back on Texans.

**Then,** they rewarded him handsomely -- he has a nearly $11 million war chest to support his reelection.

**NOW?** We just learned that **Sen. Cornyn took illegal contributions from a corrupt donor. He cares more about winning than about doing what 's right for Texans.**
---

**_This is unacceptable_ , Peter. If you want a senator who fights for Texans -- not Washington special interests -- donate to our November goal to help MJ defeat Senator Cornyn.**
